# Architecture Decision Record Template

**Decision ID:** Unique identifier (e.g. ADR‑001)  
**Date:** YYYY‑MM‑DD  
**Title:** Short description of the decision  
**Status:** Proposed / Accepted / Rejected / Superseded  
**Context:**  
Describe the technical or organisational context that triggered this decision.

**Decision:**  
State the chosen option.

**Rationale:**  
Explain why this option was chosen over the alternatives.

**Consequences:**  
Describe the impact of this decision, including trade‑offs, benefits, risks and follow‑up work.
